title: Self-Compassion
blurb: Treating yourself as you would a good friend.
lead: Self-compassion means meeting your own suffering with the kindness, understanding, and common humanity you'd offer someone you love.

blocks.text: Self-compassion, researched extensively by Kristin Neff, has three parts: self-kindness, a sense of common humanity, and mindful awareness of your pain.
Contrary to fears that it's self-indulgent, research shows self-compassion builds resilience, reduces anxiety and depression, and supports real change more effectively than self-criticism.

resources.title: Self-compassion exercises
resources.whyHere: Free guided practices from the leading researcher.
